subject: Re: Hedge Fund Equity Volatility Arbitrage Replication Research
body:
give me dollar figures with margin and upside spreadsheet

From: "Spector, Edward (PBIG New York, NY (Downtown))" <edward_spector@ml.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Thursday, February 8, 2007 8:41:17 PM
Subject: RE: Hedge Fund Equity Volatility Arbitrage Replication Research

Message

 
DIV {
MARGIN:0px;}



I may be able to do a swap into this index.  You would avoid 
hedge fund type promotes. If interested,let me know and I will inquire.It would 
be real interesting if I can do the index and write swaptions against it as 
well. 

 

 

Ed Spector, CIMA 
Vice President 
212 236 
1660 (T) 
212 236 1644 (F)

Merrill Lynch considers trade confirmations 
and monthly statements to be the official record of all transactions and 
balances.
